metadata.description: Default informative prior distributions for MOSAIC model parameters. v15.0 (2026-04-23): zeta_1, zeta_2, and zeta_ratio re-estimated from literature meta-analysis (~6 OOM scale shift on zeta_1). zeta_2 added as first-class prior.

decay_days_spread.description: Spread between min and max V. cholerae survival time (days)

decay_shape_1.description: First shape parameter of Beta distribution for V. cholerae decay

decay_shape_2.description: Second shape parameter of Beta distribution for V. cholerae decay

kappa.description: Concentration of V. cholerae for 50% infectious dose (meta-analyzed from 13 literature sources)

omega_1.description: Vaccine waning rate (one dose, per day)

omega_2.description: Vaccine waning rate (two dose, per day)

chi_endemic.description: PPV among suspected cases during endemic periods (Weins et al. 2023, all settings)

chi_epidemic.description: PPV among suspected cases during epidemic periods (Weins et al. 2023, during outbreaks)

rho.description: Care-seeking rate: probability a symptomatic infection is reported as suspected (GEMS + Wiens 2025)

zeta_1.description: Symptomatic shedding rate (V. cholerae cells per infected person per day); literature meta-analysis

zeta_2.description: Asymptomatic shedding rate (V. cholerae cells per infected person per day); derived at sampling time as zeta_1/zeta_ratio, this prior is the literature-derived reference for validation

zeta_ratio.description: Ratio of symptomatic to asymptomatic shedding rate (zeta_1 / zeta_2); direct literature-anchor channel (Smith 2026, Chao 2011, Finger 2018, Nelson 2009 paired, etc.)

rho_deaths.description: Death detection rate: probability a true cholera death is captured by surveillance (Finger et al. 2024)

beta_j0_tot.description: Total base transmission rate (human + environmental); lognormal with median=2e-5 and Q97.5=2e-4

p_beta.description: Proportion of total base transmission that is human-to-human (0–1)

theta_j.description: WASH coverage index (proportion with adequate WASH)

prop_V1_initial.description: Initial proportion in one-dose vaccine (V1) compartment

prop_V2_initial.description: Initial proportion in two-dose vaccine (V2) compartment

prop_S_initial.description: Initial proportion in susceptible (S) compartment from constrained residual

mu_j_baseline.description: Baseline daily mortality rate per symptomatic infected (per day), derived from observed reported CFR: mu_j_baseline = reported_CFR × rho / chi

mu_j_slope.description: Temporal trend in baseline IFR (proportion change over simulation period)

mu_j_epidemic_factor.description: Proportional increase in IFR during epidemic periods (e.g., 0.5 = 50% increase)

epidemic_threshold.description: Dimensionless daily Isym/N prevalence threshold for epidemic regime activation. Compared against Isym[t - delta_reporting_cases] / N[t - delta_reporting_cases] in LASER. Derived from observed median weekly reported incidence per 100k (outbreak-positive weeks) converted via Zheng formula using config rho, chi_endemic, and gamma_1. Truncnorm(mean = prior_mean, sd = 0.65*prior_mean, a = prior_mean/10, b = min(0.01, prior_mean*10)).

psi_star_a.description: Shape/gain parameter for logit calibration of NN suitability psi (a>1 sharpens peaks, a<1 flattens)

psi_star_b.description: Scale/offset parameter for logit calibration of NN suitability psi (shifts baseline up/down)

psi_star_z.description: Smoothing weight for causal EWMA of calibrated suitability (z=1: no smoothing, z<1: smoothing)

psi_star_k.description: Time offset in days for suitability calibration (k>0: epidemic lags suitability peak; k<0: epidemic precedes suitability peak). Bounded to [-90, 90]: both lag and advance are permitted.
